settings.title: We're here to help
settings.content: Contact us directly if you have any further questions.

settings.title: What does your warranty cover?
settings.content:
Every AutoFull product is designed and tested for industry-leading safety and durability. That’s why we stand behind all our chairs and desks with up to a 3-year extended warranty. Aesthetic defects and damage due to misuse of product are not covered.

To make a warranty claim, submit your claim via our Contact page, along with image or video evidence of the affected area. AutoFull reserves the final right to determine if a benefit under the warranty can be claimed.

settings.title: Can I cancel my order?
settings.content: Due to the relatively short turnaround time between processing and courier pick-up, your order may already be on its way to you. We will try our best to cancel your order but in the event we are unable to cancel it in time and your order gets delivered, reach out to our Support team via our Contact page to initiate a return. For a smooth return process, do not open the packaging.

settings.title: Where does AutoFull ship to?
settings.content: We ship to residential or commercial addresses in the United States, but are unable to deliver to PO boxes.

settings.title: How long will it take to get my orders?
settings.content: It depends on where you are. Orders processed here will take 1 business day to arrive. Deliveries can take anywhere from 3-7 days. Delivery details will be provided in your confirmation email.

settings.title: How do I track my order?
settings.content: Once your order ships, you'll receive a shipping confirmation email and tracking number, so you can follow your package as it makes its way to you. However, tracking information can take up to 24 hours to update, so don’t worry if it doesn't show up immediately. We recommend tracking your order and ensuring that you’re home on the day of delivery to receive your order.

settings.title: What is the weight limit for AutoFull chairs?
settings.content:
The weight limits for the AutoFull M6 and AutoFull C3 are found below:

AutoFull M6

  • 396 Pounds

AutoFull C3

  • 350 Pounds

While our chairs have been designed to withstand even higher loads, we arrived at these recommended weight limits after rigorous testing to identify the optimal weight.

settings.title: Why choose a AutoFull M6 over other chairs?
settings.content: AutoFull M6 Gaming Chair has ventilated heating seat cushion!, and it's ultra-soft porous leather ensures maximum comfort without the heat buildup. Stay focused and comfortable, no matter how intense the game gets.

settings.title: What's the difference between AutoFull M6 Advanced and M6 Premium?
settings.content: The AutoFull M6 Advanced gaming chair with ventilation and heated function. The AutoFull M6 Premium gaming chair's seat cushion does not have this feature.

settings.title: What are dynamic tracking lumbar support?
settings.content: With a 100mm adjustable range both in and out, and 4 presets, adapts to your every move, ensuring optimal comfort and support throughout your gaming sessions or long time work. Say goodbye to discomfort and hello to a more sustainable and enjoyable gaming experience!

settings.title: What are mechanical armrests?
settings.content: The mechanical armrest has the function of multi-angle adjustment. you can adjust them in 6 dimensions to fit PC gaming, mobile gaming, console gaming, and more. Perfect for gaming, working, and relaxing!

settings.title: I have received my order. Can I exchange it for a different variant or model?
settings.content: We do not offer exchanges for our products at the moment. However, we do have a Return policy which you may refer to for more information.

settings.title: What do I do if I face an issue with my AutoFull products?
settings.content: In the unlikely event that you encounter any damaged, defective or missing parts, please drop us a ticket on our Contact page with photos of the affected area and your order number. Our support specialists will do their best to assist you.

settings.title: Assembly & Aftercare
settings.content: Most of our products ship fully assembled, but some products require minimal assembly. Listed below are the assembly instructions for our products that require assembly.
